channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: AI washing is the same mistake leaders make with every tech disruption
item.description: Using AI to justify layoffs misses the chance to build stronger organizations, says a veteran tech leader.

item.title: Diversify your credit card points like you would your retirement portfolio
item.description: Spreading points across programs protects against devaluations by a single airline.

item.title: Ms. Anti Work founder built a media company while working a 'lazy girl job'
item.description: Gabrielle Judge created an empire by helping others move away from the 9-to-5 grind.

item.title: Economist Tyler Cowen says AI's main challenge is adaptation, not job loss
item.description: Cowen predicts most Americans will find life normal and happier, but warns lawyers and bankers face major disruption.
